title: Streptomyces cyclosori sp. nov., a novel actinobacterium from the rhizosphere soil of Cyclosorus parasiticus (L.) Farw.
author_string: Gao, Rongjian, Chen, Yazi, Xiao, Yan, Gao, Jian
abstract: A novel actinobacterium strain cg36<sup>T</sup>, from the rhizosphere of Cyclosorus parasiticus, was subjected to a polyphasic taxonomic study. 16S rRNA gene sequence analysis showed that strain cg36<sup>T</sup> shared the highest 16S rRNA gene sequence similarity to Streptomyces lavendofoliae NBRC 12882<sup>T</sup>. Phylogenetic analysis of 16S rRNA gene sequence indicated that strain cg36<sup>T</sup> formed a distinct branch within the genus Streptomyces. Phylogenetic analysis of five housekeeping gene and whole genome sequences showed that strain cg36<sup>T</sup> was closely related to Streptomyces crystallinus JCM 5067<sup>T</sup> and Streptomyces noboritoensis JCM 4557<sup>T</sup>. But, overall genome related index (OGRI) and multilocus sequence analysis (MLSA) confirmed that strain cg36<sup>T</sup> was clearly different from them. A comparison of differential features among strain cg36<sup>T</sup>, S. crystallinus CGMCC 4.1600<sup>T</sup> and S. noboritoensis CGMCC 4.1457<sup>T</sup> provided, at least to some extent, some useful information for strain cg36<sup>T</sup> as an independent species. In addition, OGRI values and MLSA evolutionary distance between strain cg36<sup>T</sup> and other strains, which had 16S rRNA gene sequence similarity of >98.65% to strain cg36<sup>T</sup>, further demonstrated that strain cg36<sup>T</sup> was a new species. Whole-cell hydrolysates of strain cg36<sup>T</sup> contained LL-diaminopimelic acid and whole-cell sugars contain glucose. The predominant cellular fatty acids (>10%) were anteiso-C<sub>15:0</sub>, iso-C<sub>15:0</sub> and C<sub>16:0</sub>. The DNA G + C content of the genome sequence, consisting of 9,022,416 bp, was 72.5%. All these data indicated that strain cg36<sup>T</sup> represents a novel Streptomyces species, for which the name Streptomyces cyclosori sp. nov. is proposed. The type strain is strain cg36<sup>T</sup> (=MCCC 1K09286<sup>T</sup> = JCM 37520<sup>T</sup>).
